creator: hq@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->feedback

The port does not deinstall cleanly: 

$ make deinstall 
===>  Deinstalling for devel/apache-ant 
===>   Deinstalling apache-ant-1.7.0 
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/share/java/apache-ant/lib' 
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/share/java/apache-ant' 
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is 
incorrectly specified?) 

BTW, I tested with several "major" Java ports and they seem to build fine with 
Ant 1.7.0. This means that we could probably commit the patch (once pkg-plist 
is fixed) without needing a test run on the build cluster beforehand.
